topPlaces.name: Asandi
topPlaces.description: Asandi is a village in Kadur taluk, Chikkamagaluru district, Karnataka, India. It is situated 5 miles (8.0 km) from Ajjampura railway station.

topPlaces.name: Chikkanayakana Halli
topPlaces.description: Chikkanayakanahalli is a town (taluk headquarters) in Tiptur sub-division of Tumakuru district, in the state of Karnataka, India. It is 30 km away from Tiptur and 132 km from Bengaluru.

topPlaces.name: Adinayakanahalli
topPlaces.description: Adinayakanahalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Tiptur taluk of Tumkur district in Karnataka.

Adinayakanahalli is a village in the southern state of Karnataka, India. It is located in the Tiptur taluk of Tumkur district in Karnataka.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Yoga Madhava Temple, Settikere?
faq.a: The best time to visit Yoga Madhava Temple, Settikere is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Yoga Madhava Temple, Settikere?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kempegowda International Airport, Bengaluru (126 km) and the nearest railway station is KSR Bengaluru City Junction (118 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Yoga Madhava Temple, Settikere?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Yoga Madhava Temple, Settikere at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Yoga Madhava Temple, Settikere?
faq.a: Stays in Yoga Madhava Temple, Settikere start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Yoga Madhava Temple, Settikere?
faq.a: The top attractions are Asandi, Chikkanayakana Halli, Adinayakanahalli.
